title: looshy dark mode
description: a dark mode overlay for the looshy pack
body:
![cartoony image that says "looshy"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69233e1c18029c046ede510c1c66a6344cad1f6c.png)
___
### the classic look of minecraft, but smoother... and now in dark mode
ever wondered what it would be like to not blind yourself every time you opened a gui?

introducing... dark mode! it's the same pack but now your eyes will have an easier time. hopefully.
___

### read me first!!

this is an **extension/overlay** and not a standalone pack!

please update to the latest pack release here: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/looshy/versions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/looshy/versions). this overlay will be updated if any affected textures are updated.
